narrative.us_narrative: US futures pointing higher ahead of tonight's session. Key data: ISM Manufacturing PMI due at 12am AEST.

asx_deep_dive.overview: The ASX 200 closed at session highs, up 0.4% to 8,142.50. Mining and energy led while REITs lagged on rising bond yields. Breadth was positive with advancers outnumbering decliners 3:2.

sectors.name: Mining & Resources
sectors.summary: Best sector on iron ore strength.

movers.name: Fortescue
movers.explanation: Led miners on iron ore rally and positive broker commentary.

movers.name: BHP Group
movers.explanation: Iron ore strength and China stimulus hopes.

sectors.name: Energy
sectors.summary: Oil and gas stocks gained on EU-Russia sanctions.

watchlist.name: Liontown Resources
watchlist.news_digest: Kathleen Valley ramp-up ahead of schedule. First spodumene shipment confirmed for Q2.

watchlist.name: Pilbara Minerals
watchlist.news_digest: BMX auction cleared at higher-than-expected price.
